name: AI Upscaler Plugin
overview: AI-Powered Video Upscaling Plugin with Docker Microservice Architecture
description: Revolutionary AI upscaling plugin with Docker-based AI processing. Supports NVIDIA CUDA/TensorRT, Intel OpenVINO, AMD ROCm, and CPU. Features automated hardware benchmarking, intelligent fallback system, pre-processing cache, sidebar integration, camera-style video filters with live preview, and AI face restoration (GFPGAN / CodeFormer).
changelog: v1.6.1.8: Quick-menu model picker now actually loads the model — calls POST /Upscaler/models/load to make the AI service map the weights into memory (previously only persisted the config without warming the service). Error toasts now show the real HTTP/service error instead of a generic failure message. Menu dismisses immediately so the load-progress toast is visible. | v1.6.1.7: AI Face Restoration — GFPGAN v1.4 + CodeFormer integration with OpenCV Haar face detection, feathered alpha-blend paste-back, configurable max-faces & resolution guard. 8 new camera-style filter presets (Sepia, Pastel, Cyberpunk, Drama, Soft Glow, Sharp HD, Retro Game, Teal & Orange). Live Filter Preview now auto-updates on preset dropdown change (300ms debounce, supersedes in-flight requests). Diagnostic docs for the 9 multi-frame / interpolation / Vulkan models that fail single-frame bench. Docker service version synced to 1.6.1.7 with /face-restore/* endpoints. | v1.6.1.6: Live Filter Preview on Filters tab — pick a video, apply any preset to a real frame, compare before/after. New endpoint GET /Upscaler/filter-preview/frame/{itemId}?preset=X. | v1.6.1.5: Fix SMB/network share support in Comparison View — use Jellyfin IMediaEncoder for path resolution. | v1.6.1.4: Comparison View now extracts real video frames via FFmpeg instead of poster images. | v1.6.1.3: Fix controller route — remove api/ prefix so frontend API calls reach the controller. | v1.6.1.2: Fix remaining red Error states on Test Connection/Upscale/SSH buttons. | v1.6.1.1: Fix misleading Error/Unavailable states — show Standalone mode when AI service not configured. Neutral gray styling. Add local filter benchmark. Version display fix. Save button on Filters tab. | v1.6.1.0: Camera-style video filters (7 presets + custom mode). Filter-preview API endpoint.
